UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Eight of Cups card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Eight of Cups card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Eight of Cups card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Eight of Cups card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Eight of Cups card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Eight of Cups card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the Buddha's enlightened calm face as a symbol of inner peace achieved through renunciation.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the abandonment aspect, instead focus on the journey towards self-discovery and spiritual growth.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Eight of Cups card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, oboe, ambient, ethereal, triumphant, major, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Eight of Cups card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Eight of Cups card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the endless journey of the Wandering Jew, the cups symbolizing opportunities left behind.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the destination as this card suggests a continuous journey rather than arrival.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Eight of Cups card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, flutes, harp, reversed, introspective, contemplative, minor, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Eight of Cups card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Eight of Cups card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight Sinbad's resolve to embark on a new adventure, the misaligned cups symbolizing the leaving behind of past burdens.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the sailor's glance back, as it signifies not dwelling on the past but looking forward with hope.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Eight of Cups card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, piano, ethereal, contemplative, major, instrumental
